user_task_description: This review note document contains several clauses, but only some are marked as critical.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Visually highlight the lines that are explicitly marked as Critical.
atomic_scope: Only emphasis/highlighting is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document with the correct lines highlighted.

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The critical lines are embedded in otherwise plain text
- The task is local, so over-highlighting is a failure mode
- The document contains multiple clauses that look equally important but are not explicitly marked critical
